title: Oceanic
body:
# Welcome to Oceanic! 


The world is undergoing some sudden and unnatural changes as our reality leaks into Minecraft's oceans!

**Discover 10 new fish, over 25 new items. 3 New Music Discs, and more!**

## 🐟 About

**Warning**

*This is one of my older data packs and does not follow data pack conventions, nor is it very optimized. I do plan on updating/remaking this data pack. And i will get rid of this warning and edit the changelog when I do. Thank you for playing anyway!*





This data pack overhauls Minecraft's oceans and adds a lot of new content. Some not completely related to the ocean. As soon as you join you will be given a guide book that will tell you most important information. Skip the the last pages for recipes,

*A custom advancement tree has been added. Along with a couple secret advancements!*

Fishing in many different biomes can lead to catching new and interesting fish. All unique to that biome usually. Some fish will give special effects once grilled, others act as normal food items. Those fish can also be seen as mobs in those same biomes, so deep diving can lead to some interesting finds!

You will also find anglers near beaches who will be willing to trade fish for more valuable items in the pack. Such as loot bags or an oceanic guide if you lose your first one.


## Creative Mode

<details>
<summary>📇 Functions 📇</summary>


Give Functions:


/function fishing:give/(category)

Categories:

- All - All items in the pack
- Discs - All Music Discs
- Fish Grill - Fish Grill
- Fish - All Custom Fish Items
- Foods - All custom Food Items
- Loot Bag - Loot Bag
- Message in a Bottle - Message in a bottle with a random message
- Spawn Eggs - All entity Spawn Eggs
- Useless - Junk items like cans and fish skeletons

/function fishing:mobs/(mob)/give

Gives a single spawn egg of a specific mob

</details>

## Survival Mode

<details>
<summary>📋 Recipes 📋</summary>

***FLOOR CRAFTING RECIPES:***

**Sushi:**

Kelp x1 , Any Fish x1


**Crab Bisque:**

Mushroom Stew x1 , Grilled Crab Leg x2



Due to a bug I've been running into with prewritten book generators, I recommend just using the crafting recipes on this page rather than the ones in the guide book!



Crafting Table Recipes:

**Trident:**
![Trident](https://i.imgur.com/v7QRhrb.png)

**Fish Grill:**
![Fish Grill](https://i.imgur.com/e6UQ0sA.png)

</details>


Anyway, lots of this pack will be left as a surprise for you to find as you play, so have fun!
